question: How much does a website cost?
answer: Our packages start from ₹8,999 for a basic 5-page website. The final price depends on your requirements — features, pages, and integrations. We offer a free consultation to give you an exact quote with no hidden charges.

question: How long does it take to build a website?
answer: A standard website takes 7–14 days. More complex projects with apps or AI chatbots may take 3–4 weeks. We'll give you a clear timeline before we start.

question: Do you provide website maintenance after launch?
answer: Yes! All packages include free support for 1–6 months depending on your plan. After that, we offer affordable monthly maintenance plans starting from ₹1,999/month.

question: What is an AI Chatbot and do I need one?
answer: An AI Chatbot answers customer questions on your website 24/7 — even when you're asleep. It captures leads, handles FAQs, and books consultations automatically. Most businesses see a 30–50% increase in enquiries after adding one.

question: Can you help my business rank on Google?
answer: Absolutely. SEO (Search Engine Optimization) is built into every website we make. We also offer dedicated SEO services to help your business appear on the first page of Google for Kolkata-based searches.

question: Do you work with businesses outside Kolkata?
answer: Yes! While we specialize in helping Kolkata businesses, we work with clients across West Bengal and across India. Our remote work process is smooth and transparent.

question: What is WhatsApp Automation?
answer: WhatsApp Automation lets your business send automatic replies, appointment reminders, order updates, and promotional messages to customers via WhatsApp — saving hours of manual work every week.

question: Are there any hidden charges?
answer: Never. We believe in complete transparency. All pricing is discussed upfront. The only additional costs are third-party services like domain registration (₹800–1,500/year) and hosting (if not on Vercel free tier).
